subcodes.first_line: The Wronged One, the Peerless One, proclaimeth: O people of God! Know ye the worth and station of this mighty and glorious Day [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مظلوم یکتا میگوید یا حزب الله قدر و مقام این یوم عزیز عظیم را بدانید و بر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @unity; oneness of humanity, @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment
